description_long: This house features a modern, rectangular design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is predominantly white with large, floor-to-ceiling windows arranged in symmetrical rows along both long sides, allowing for ample natural light. The structure appears to have two stories, with the upper and lower levels both featuring expansive glass panels. One side of the house includes a protruding section, likely for additional interior space or a small balcony. The entryway is marked by a set of double glass doors, framed by tall windows, and there are no visible decorative elements or overhangs. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, emphasizing openness and transparency.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, and large symmetrical windows. The design is minimalist, featuring clean lines and extensive glass surfaces.
description_view_0: This side shows two stories with large, vertically aligned windows and a protruding section on the right.
description_view_1: The narrow end view highlights the main entryway with double glass doors and tall windows above.
description_view_2: The opposite long side mirrors the window arrangement of view 0 but without the protruding section.
description_view_3: The rear view displays a plain wall with two smaller windows on the upper level.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large floor-to-ceiling windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with double glass doors and tall windows, no porch or decorative overhang
